title: TC Toys - Christmas Stocking Filler: A4 Colouring Set with 8 Festive Sheets, 6 Mini Pencils & Fun Sticker Sheet | Perfect Xmas Activity Book & Party Favor (1)
features: INSTANT Stocking Stuffer & Party Favor Ready: The ultimate Christmas stocking filler and easy party bag treat! This complete set offers instant festive fun and keeps kids happily engaged during school holidays, Christmas Eve, or classroom parties and celebrations.

COMPLETE 15-Piece Activity Kit: Everything needed for immediate creative play right out of the box. Each pack includes 8 large A4 colouring sheets featuring classic festive designs, a sheet of vibrant Christmas stickers, and 6 essential mini colouring pencils.

PERFECTLY Sized for Travel & Gifting: Sized at A4 (approx. 21cm x 30cm), the sheets are large enough for detailed Xmas art but the overall set is slim and lightweight—ideal for fitting into travel bags, school rucksacks, or wrapping up for a Secret Santa or teacher reward.

Boosts Creativity & Quiet Time: Encourage artistic skills and provide a screen-free quiet time activity with engaging Xmas crafts. This set is highly effective for building focus and imagination for both boys and girls who love to colour and decorate.
description: The Ultimate Festive Colouring & Sticker Set for Kids! Get ready for holiday excitement with this complete, all-in-one Christmas Activity Set! For parents, teachers, and party planners seeking Christmas stocking stuffers. This fantastic festive set is packed with everything a child needs to unleash their creativity: 8 large A4 colouring sheets filled with classic Christmas characters and scenes, a sheet of fun, vibrant Christmas stickers to decorate their artwork, and a full set of 6 mini colouring pencils to start immediately. It’s the perfect solution for keeping children entertained during: Christmas Eve anticipation. Long winter travel. School end-of-term parties. Classroom rewards or activities. Forget digital screens! This engaging Xmas art and craft activity encourages fine motor skills, focus, and hours of imaginative, quiet-time fun. Add a splash of color to the holidays—this set makes gifting simple and delightfully easy!

specifications_table.Included Components: 8 A4 colouring sheets, 1 sticker sheet, 6 mini colouring pencils
